'''鈭歭-v-b''' ('''kalavab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brail|brail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brail|brail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-v-b
|-
! Lemma
| kalavab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilavab|thilavab]] || [[word:jilavab|jilavab]] || [[word:shilavab|shilavab]] || [[word:kilavab|kilavab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulavab|thuthulavab]] || [[word:jujulavab|jujulavab]] || [[word:shushulavab|shushulavab]] || [[word:kukulavab|kukulavab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulavab|thulavab]] || [[word:julavab|julavab]] || [[word:shulavab|shulavab]] || [[word:kulavab|kulavab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulavab|thulavab]] || [[word:julavab|julavab]] || [[word:shulavab|shulavab]] || [[word:kulavab|kulavab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelavab|thelavab]] || [[word:jelavab|jelavab]] || [[word:shelavab|shelavab]] || [[word:kelavab|kelavab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholavab|thotholavab]] || [[word:jojolavab|jojolavab]] || [[word:shosholavab|shosholavab]] || [[word:kokolavab|kokolavab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholavab|tholavab]] || [[word:jolavab|jolavab]] || [[word:sholavab|sholavab]] || [[word:kolavab|kolavab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholavab|tholavab]] || [[word:jolavab|jolavab]] || [[word:sholavab|sholavab]] || [[word:kolavab|kolavab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lavab|th忙lavab]] || [[word:j忙lavab|j忙lavab]] || [[word:sh忙lavab|sh忙lavab]] || [[word:k忙lavab|k忙lavab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalavab|thathalavab]] || [[word:jajalavab|jajalavab]] || [[word:shashalavab|shashalavab]] || [[word:kakalavab|kakalavab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalavab|thalavab]] || [[word:jalavab|jalavab]] || [[word:shalavab|shalavab]] || [[word:kalavab|kalavab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalavab|thalavab]] || [[word:jalavab|jalavab]] || [[word:shalavab|shalavab]] || [[word:kalavab|kalavab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalavab|shalavab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalavab|goshalavab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalavab|gokishalavab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalavabn眉|shalavabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalavabnkn眉|goshalavabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalavabn眉|gokishalavabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalavabsh毛|shalavabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalavabnksh毛|goshalavabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalavabsh毛|gokishalavabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalavabro|shalavabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalavabnkro|goshalavabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalavabro|gokishalavabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalavabmu|shalavabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalavabnkmu|goshalavabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalavabmu|gokishalavabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalavabsher|shalavabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalavabnksher|goshalavabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalavabsher|gokishalavabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalavabng|shalavabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalavabnkng|goshalavabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalavabng|gokishalavabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalavabya|shalavabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalavabnkya|goshalavabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalavabya|gokishalavabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalavabyam|shalavabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalavabnkyam|goshalavabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalavabyam|gokishalavabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalavabn眉sh毛|shalavabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalavabnkn眉sh毛|goshalavabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalavabn眉sh毛|gokishalavabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalavabn眉ro|shalavabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalavabnkn眉ro|goshalavabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalavabn眉ro|gokishalavabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalavabn眉mu|shalavabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalavabnkn眉mu|goshalavabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalavabn眉mu|gokishalavabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalavabsh毛n眉|shalavabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalavabnksh毛n眉|goshalavabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalavabsh毛n眉|gokishalavabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalavabsh毛ro|shalavabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalavabnksh毛ro|goshalavabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalavabsh毛ro|gokishalavabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalavabsh毛mu|shalavabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalavabnksh毛mu|goshalavabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalavabsh毛mu|gokishalavabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalavabron眉|shalavabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalavabnkron眉|goshalavabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalavabron眉|gokishalavabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalavabrosh毛|shalavabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalavabnkrosh毛|goshalavabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalavabrosh毛|gokishalavabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalavabromu|shalavabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalavabnkromu|goshalavabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalavabromu|gokishalavabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalavabmun眉|shalavabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalavabnkmun眉|goshalavabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalavabmun眉|gokishalavabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalavabmush毛|shalavabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalavabnkmush毛|goshalavabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalavabmush毛|gokishalavabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalavabmuro|shalavabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalavabnkmuro|goshalavabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalavabmuro|gokishalavabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
